commit_scope: Parallel aquatic organs for water-based organisms: organ driver, tester, hardware spec as Form recipes. Emitted to native binaries via 4th kernel (jit-lower + fourth-walker-emit). Supports water coherence (vortex flow, charge separation for EZ, spectrum, gentle vib) to increase organism vitality. Merged into audit and fourth-kernel.form.

commands: parallel emission of 3 aquatic drivers via Go kernel proxy for 4th emit
clang -O2 to native (with host ports note for real 4th)

results.emissions: C generated for organ driver, tester, spec lowered
results.merge: audit and fourth-kernel.form updated with aquatic section

ci_validation.notes: Parallel move as requested. No deploy impact.

deploy_validation.notes: The binaries are development/CI artifacts for the 4th kernel surface. Can be promoted.

blocked_by: physical hardware prototype and real bio integration

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Native binaries control hardware for water coherence (vortex flow, charge sep for EZ, spectrum, vib) increasing organism vitality. Tester measures response. All as lowered Form recipes, no cold-start tax.
test_flows: organ on vortex vessel + charge + spectrum
